name: hb_1_7
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Beibengfang station (北泵房) on 2025-06-02 compute and store: mean_pm25, max_pm25, mean_aqi (float), exceedance_hours (PM2.5>75, int), peak_pm25_hour_of_day (0-23, int).

turns.query: Help me analyze the pollution situation at air quality station: Beibengfang on 2025-06-02.
